title: Claude Plugins Marketplace Manifest
description: Schema for .claude-plugin/marketplace.json — the top-level marketplace index.

name.description: Owner's display name or GitHub username.

plugins.description: List of plugins registered in this marketplace.

name.description: Plugin name — must match the name field in its plugin.json.

source.description: Relative path to the plugin directory (e.g. ./plugins/elephant-goldfish).

description.description: One-line description shown in marketplace listings.
